reviews.review_description: Void Jump VR is a fast-paced and challenging experience that delivers strong arcade-style gameplay. The sense of movement and timing is very satisfying, making each run feel intense and rewarding. A great pick for players who enjoy skill-based VR games with a focus on precision and progression.

reviews.review_title: Great Fun, but needs some working out..
reviews.review_description:
The movement feels smooth, the cyber punk feel is great, with crisp visuals and great music vibe.  That said, the biggest thing holding it back from a full 5 stars is the tutorial—or lack of a clear one. The mechanics aren’t overly complicated, but they’re not immediately obvious either, and a more structured or guided introduction would make a huge difference, especially for new players. It feels like you’re expected to figure things out through trial and error, which can be a bit frustrating at first.

Once you push past that learning curve, though, it really opens up and becomes a lot of fun.  Overall, a solid VR title with great potential
I was unsure about this game until I played it. It’s very challenging and has great graphics.! It’ll definitely keep you coming back for more..!

So this game is quite fun. However the level selection was odd at first. I selected what I thought was level 1 and started but nothing looked different. Then I realized it was level 1 after falling a few times not realizing what I was supposed to do. 

Once I realized I was just supposed to hit the button to finish the level and that it wasn't bugged it was actually fun. Im only a few levels in now but will be playing more soon. Just suggest adding something in that first level so players know what they are supposed to do.

Visually this looks stunning, vibrant colours & clean looking backdrops.
The look of the game is very futuristic, I am only just into the game but wanted to add a score for now Diego the meta mess up allowing this game to install, delaying any gameplay or reviews which definitely hurt the dev.
I will add more content in this review once I have given it a proper play through.
The lack of a proper tutorial is the only downside, with no proper explanation of what to do.

Void Jump VR is a really fun and immersive experience, it took a little while to work out what I was meant to do, but once i had worked the mechanics it became quite satisfying, it did however start to become repetitive, overall a good  experience with a lot of potential. Definitely worth checking out if you enjoy movement-based VR games. Looking forward to future updates!
I made it through all of the levels and have to say this is a really fun futuristic parkour adventure, each level can be beat multiple ways, awesome super jumps and great replayability 😁

Void Jump is an awesome plattformer with stunning visuals set inside a cool cyberpunk world. The concept is innovative and the gameplay pretty fast. Is has a steep learning curve. For me a clear recommendation
Graphics and audio are great, but instructions on what to do are lacking.

I have acrophobia, but I'm not too scared in this game. I'm not used to the concept of jumping using the controller's movement, so I'm not used to it, but once I get used to it, I think I can try it more naturally. I wish there was a tutorial that only practiced jumping at first, but I think it would be a way to try it again and again by hitting it yourself. There are a pretty challenging stages, which inspires me to challenge myself.
Merci, Majerik!
